creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
On closer inspection …

As a template (for use with future releases), it's strange that this is not amongst the indexed pages: 

> FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE Announcement

It can be reached from the sidebar – click "13.1" – however the sidebar will, eventually, lose this link. 

Please consider adding the eighth page, the announcement, to the list. 

Thanks
